centertext_templates: every exhale releasing tension from your {body_part}
breath by breath your {body_part} relaxes further
the pulse in your {body_part} slow and steady
warmth and weight in your {body_part} releasing
each breath deepening the stillness in your {body_part}
your {body_part} heavy, warm, completely at ease
tts_templates: with each slow exhale, your {body_part} releases a little more tension, softening into the warmth and quiet that's already there
notice the rhythm of your {body_part} responding to each breath, and as you do, the tension already begins to ease without any effort at all
your {body_part} knows the rhythm of release, and each exhale is an invitation it accepts naturally, softening a little more each time
the warmth in your {body_part} and the rhythm of your breath are already working together, and with each cycle, the ease grows deeper
there is a natural heaviness that comes with each exhale, your {body_part} responding by settling deeper, releasing a little more of what it was holding
